verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It won't be long, Soon we'll be leaving here It won't be long, We'll be going home

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Count the years as months, And count the months as weeks, And count the weeks as days, Anyday now we'll be going home.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We shall be like Him We shall be like Him We shall be like Him Anyday now we'll be going home

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We shall be like Him, like Jesus We shall be like Him, like Jesus In a twinkling of an eye In the moment of time We'll be going home.
